summary: Tighten venues-compare description to match what the dynamic endpoint actually returns.
reason: Original Short said 'Compare open status, ETA window, and delivery configs' but venueCompareRow has no ETA fields — the dynamic endpoint returns next-close/open timestamps, not delivery-time-in-minutes (that lives in /pages/restaurants). Updated Short + Long to advertise what we actually return and point users to venues-now for ETAs.
